title: Beach Toys Set for Kids -Collapsible Sand Bucket&Mesh Beach Bag and Shovels Sand Rake Toy 11Pcs Set, Animal & Dinosaur Molds,Fork,Rake&Watering Can for Toddlers Ages 3+ (sand toy set)
features: ALL-IN-ONE SET: This beach toys set includes 11 pieces like collapsible sand bucket, mesh beach bag, shovels, rakes, molds and more for endless creative play
HOURS OF FUN: Kids can build sandcastles and structures with molds, rake and shape the sand, scoop and pour with buckets and more to spark their imagination
CONVENIENT STORAGE: The collapsible bucket and mesh bag allow easy transport and storage of all toys when not in use or after a fun day at the beach
DURABLE MATERIALS: Made from BPA-free, non-toxic plastic that can withstand impact and abrasion from sand and water for withstanding the elements during beach play
IDEAL FOR AGES 3+: Suitable for toddlers and preschoolers to develop motor skills, hand-eye coordination and problem-solving through open-ended play with these beach-themed toys
description: Product description This beach toys set allows kids to enjoy hours of creative play at the shore. With 11 pieces including collapsible sand buckets, shovels, rakes and molds in fun animal shapes, young imaginations can run wild sculpting sandcastles and landscapes. The mesh beach bag conveniently holds and transports all the toys so kids are never bored. Durable plastic molds let them construct dinosaur or sea creature sculptures that will stand the test of the waves. Kids ages 3 and up will love shaping the sand then smoothing it out with rakes or filling buckets, helping develop motor skills. When playtime is done, collapsible buckets and bags pack down small for easy carrying back to the car. This complete set has everything little hands need to spend the whole day crafting at the beach.
